_meta.description: Flux.1 Kontext [dev] + IPAdapter 角色一致性出图工作流模板
_meta.status: TEMPLATE — 需在 ComfyUI 中搭建后替换为实际节点 JSON
_meta.author: AI Production Team

recommended_nodes.purpose: 加载角色参考图（正面/侧面/背面三视图）

recommended_nodes.prompt_template: Ava, a 28-year-old woman with short dark hair, amber eyes, light scar under right eye, cybernetic neural interface glowing on the back of her neck, wearing dark gray windbreaker with patched right shoulder, black turtleneck, dark cargo pants, scuffed military boots, left wrist glowing bracelet, weathered data terminal at waist, {scene_description}, cinematic sci-fi lighting, film grain, teal and orange color grade
bad anatomy, deformed face, extra limbs, blurry, low quality, inconsistent character, different person, mutated hands

recommended_nodes.purpose: 加载 FLUX.1-Kontext-dev FP8 模型

notes: 建议使用 RTX 4090 24GB 运行 FP8 版本。
角色参考图需保证光照均匀、面部清晰。
每次生成后执行盲测，筛选一致性最高的图作为新的参考图。
